blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: To the coast. And to people who actually show up.

blocks.speaker: Sophie Laurent
blocks.content: To the food, which is incredible.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: Glad you're here. Both of you. It's good to have more people at the table.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: Nah. Thank you for saying yes. Some people need convincing.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: He means me. I said we shouldn't invite strangers to dinner.

blocks.speaker: Nadia Reyes
blocks.content: He's almost never wrong. He'll be talking about this for weeks.
Marcus laughed and it reached his eyes. For the first time all day it fully reached his eyes.

blocks.prompt: Wren asked first. What does that mean?

options.label: She sees things before other people do.
She just happened to be looking.
